reason: Contains pro-caliphate terminology ('أنصارالخلافة' meaning 'supporters of the caliphate'), mentions 'Jund al-Khilafah' (Soldiers of the Caliphate) which is a known ISIS-affiliated group in Algeria, and references an emir/leader figure
